hooks.command: STDIN=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$STDIN" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); BASENAME=$(basename "${FILE:-파일}"); cd "D:/Data_JARI/JARI_Dev/CLAUDE" || exit 0; [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ] && exit 0; git add -A && git commit -m "auto: ${BASENAME} 업데이트" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null || true
